properties.name: iqair.api.key
properties.description: API key for IQAir requests.

properties.name: iqair.api.url
properties.description: Base URL for IQAir API.

properties.name: iqair.city
properties.description: Default city used for non-location AQI lookups.

properties.name: iqair.state
properties.description: Default state used for non-location AQI lookups.

properties.name: iqair.country
properties.description: Default country used for non-location AQI lookups.

properties.name: line.messaging.channel-token
properties.description: LINE Messaging API channel access token.

properties.name: line.messaging.channel-secret
properties.description: LINE Messaging API channel secret used for webhook signature verification.

properties.name: line.messaging.broadcast-url
properties.description: LINE Messaging API broadcast endpoint.

properties.name: line.messaging.reply-url
properties.description: LINE Messaging API reply endpoint.

properties.name: line.messaging.push-url
properties.description: LINE Messaging API push endpoint.

properties.name: groq.api.key
properties.description: Groq API key for health-guideline generation.

properties.name: groq.api.url
properties.description: Groq chat completions endpoint.

properties.name: groq.model
properties.description: Groq model name used for health-guideline generation.

properties.name: line.login.channel-id
properties.description: LINE Login channel ID used to verify LIFF ID tokens.

properties.name: line.login.verify-url
properties.description: LINE endpoint for ID token verification.

properties.name: liff.id
properties.description: Default LIFF ID.

properties.name: liff.aqi-id
properties.description: LIFF ID for the AQI check page.

properties.name: liff.settings-id
properties.description: LIFF ID for the settings page.

properties.name: liff.history-id
properties.description: LIFF ID for the history page.

properties.name: app.admin.secret
properties.description: Shared secret required for manual admin-only AQI trigger endpoints.
